articles.title: Indian cardamom exports regain aroma amid West Asia tensions - BusinessLine
articles.description: Indian cardamom exports surge as Guatemala faces crop failure, driving demand despite West Asia tensions and rising prices.

articles.title: Cardamom price in Kerala hits a seven-year high of over ₹6,000 per kg - The Hindu
articles.description: Cardamom prices in Kerala soar past ₹6,000/kg due to rising temperatures and low production forecasts, marking a seven-year high.

Indian cardamom exports double as Guatemala harvest almost halves - NewsBytes
articles.description: Indian cardamom exports have doubled, driven by Guatemala's crop failure, as global buyers turn to premium Indian grades despite geopolitical challenges in West Asia.
